match.userMessage:
Handheld eye-level tracking shot moves backward at a steady pace, keeping Scarlett framed as she strides forward along the curved promenade. Her hair lifts and flows in the breeze while the canvas tote swings rhythmically at her side. Turquoise waves crest and roll with visible surfers in the background. Natural micro-movements give a grounded, walking feel. Wind gusts stir loose strands and fabric edges. Bright daylight shifts soft shadows across the paved path beneath her feet.

ocean waves rolling, wind gusts along promenade. soft footsteps on pavement, tote bag fabric rustling.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
